title: Susan L. Epstein
text: Home * People * Susan L. Epstein Susan L. Epstein [1] Susan Lynn Epstein , an American mathematician, computer scientist, AI researcher and professor at Graduate Center and Hunter College , City University of New York (CUNY). Her research interests include problem solving , machine learning , knowledge representation , constraint satisfaction and cognitive modeling . In the early 90s at CUNY, she developed FORR (FOr the Right Reasons) [2] , a cognitive architecture for learning and problem solving inspired by Herbert A. Simon's ideas of bounded rationality and satisficing . Her FORR-based game playing program Hoyle [3] learned to play many different board games [4] .
